caption: Respond to a property possession claim
heading: Have you come to any agreement with {{claimantName}} to repay the arrears since {{claimIssueDate}}?
textAreaLabel: Give details about how much you’ve agreed to pay, how often you’ll pay and when the agreement was made
textAreaHint: You can enter up to 500 characters

errors.repaymentsAgreed: Select if you’ve come to any agreement with {{claimantName}} to repay the arrears since {{claimIssueDate}}
errors.repaymentsAgreed.repaymentsAgreedDetails: Give details about how much you’ve agreed to pay, how often you’ll pay and when the agreement was made
Repayments agreed details must only include letters a to z, and special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
